_meta.purpose: Named institutional reference levels extracted from TradingView. Used by Banshee SMC engine to weight confluence when an Order Block or FVG lands near a known level. Update whenever TradingView is available.
_meta.sources: TV indicators: Daily/Weekly/Monthly/Yearly Opens, Market Maker Levels (v6), VWAP Supply & Demand Zones PRO, Elliott Wave Chart Pattern
_meta.update_workflow: Open TradingView → run data_get_pine_labels + data_get_study_values via MCP → update relevant asset block below → record extracted_date

opens.note: Yearly open = annual bull/bear divider. Valid all year. Monthly resets each month.

market_maker_levels.note: ICT Previous Day/Week High+Low. Updates daily/weekly — refresh when TV is available.

vwap_zones.note: Only the current-price-range zone is meaningful. Historical zones below $100 are pre-split artifacts.

elliott_wave.current_context: 5-wave impulse complete at $212.19. ABC correction active. (b) wave near $210.95 resistance. (c) leg targets $133.42 if (b) fails.
elliott_wave.expiry_note: These targets expire when the correction completes. Pivot price levels ($212.19, $86.62 etc.) remain as permanent historical S/R.

elliott_wave.current_context: Super cycle Wave (5) topped $126,198. ABC correction active. Price $77,650 below (a) low $80,595 = confirmed (c) leg targeting $60,500.
elliott_wave.expiry_note: Target valid until price either hits $60,500 or reclaims $80,595 with conviction.

opens.note: Yearly open = annual bull/bear divider. Price above 4329.30 = yearly bias bullish.

market_maker_levels.note: ICT Previous Day/Week High+Low. Updates daily/weekly — refresh when TV is available.

vwap_zones.note: Price at extraction (4693.57) is above broken supply 4571.58, approaching 5067.88 as next major resistance.

elliott_wave.current_context: Wave (5) topped 5682.92. ABC correction active. (a) low 4452.65, (b) bounce to 5597.48. Price at 4693.57 suggests (c) leg toward 4141.83 may be developing. Yearly open (4329.30) sits just above (c) target — key confluence zone.
elliott_wave.expiry_note: Targets expire when (c) completes or price reclaims 5597.48 with conviction.

opens.yearly_open_note: Jan 1, 2026 daily bar open (TV 1D confirmed). Price at 88.51 is BELOW yearly open = annual bias BEARISH.
opens.monthly_open_note: May 1, 2026 daily bar open (TV 1D confirmed). Price at 88.51 is ABOVE monthly open = short-term bullish recovery.
opens.weekly_open_note: Week of May 5, 2026 open (TV 1W confirmed). Price above weekly open.

market_maker_levels.note: PD and PW identical — current weekly bar aligns with last daily bar. Price at extraction (88.51) is AT pd_high — textbook sell zone within bearish dealing range.

vwap_zones.note: VWAP S&D zones PRO (1W). Price (88.51) is below ALL supply zones. Nearest supply 159.53 is ~80% above current price.

daily_indicators.ema_note: Price (88.67) above EMA 9/20/50 — all three compressed ~84-85. EMA 200 at 115.82 is the ceiling. Daily structure is bullish within the weekly bear.
daily_indicators.avwap_note: Price at 88.67 is AT avwap_next_high (88.25) — immediate resistance. avwap_high (94.69) is the next target above. avwap_low (82.40) is key support.
daily_indicators.macd_1d_note: MACD just crossed zero to positive (0.13 / signal -0.17 / hist +0.30) — first positive MACD cross on 1D in months.

elliott_wave_1d.key_note: EW (c) at 125.98 is within $1.33 of yearly open (124.65) — double confluence zone. Current price (88.67) is BELOW the completed (c). Either (c) extended or new impulse has begun from the 67-75 low.

volume_profile_1d.note: Every key level lands in its own distinct VP node — no clustering. VP does not expose volume weights via MCP, so POC/VAH/VAL cannot be computed. Node map is useful for S/R confirmation only.

active_bearish_fvg_overhead.confluence: EMA 200 daily (115.82) sits inside this FVG — double resistance

smc_engine_snapshot.note: Price in premium of bearish dealing range. No unswept liquidity pools. OTE zone (85.40-87.79) already tagged.

opens.note: Price above yearly open (685.71) = annual bias bullish. Monthly open (653.90) is key support on any pullback.

market_maker_levels.note: ICT Previous Day/Week High+Low. Updates daily/weekly — refresh when TV is available.

vwap_zones.note: Price at extraction (713.94) has broken above all nearby supply zones. Demand cluster at 654.85-673.09 is key support on correction.

elliott_wave.current_context: SPY in Wave (5) of a major impulse. Minimum (0.368) extension target is 714.47 — price at extraction (713.94) is essentially AT this level. This is a major inflection point: (5) may extend to 772.29 or 860.69, OR a top is forming and correction targets 661.82-681.93.
elliott_wave.expiry_note: Wave (5) targets valid while price holds above (4) low at 629.28. Correction targets activate on a confirmed (5) top.
